<!-- Describe exactly how you fixed the bug. What code did you change? -->

## 📋 Post-Fix Checklist
- [ ] My fix does not introduce any breaking changes.
- [ ] I have cleaned up console logs, commented-out code, and debuggers.
- [ ] The code matches our project's formatting and styling rules.
